perturbation.original_text: Phoenix and Company agree to maintain as Confidential Information, the existence of these discussions regarding a possible business relationship, until an agreement is completed.
perturbation.changed_text: Rights and obligations of this Agreement shall be binding upon the heirs, assigns and successors of Phoenix and Company. Phoenix and Company agree to maintain as Confidential Information, the existence of these discussions regarding a possible business relationship, until an agreement is completed.
perturbation.explanation: Moving the confidentiality clause regarding the existence of business discussions to a section about successors and assigns reduces its prominence. Confidentiality agreements often have specific durations and clear placement. This weakens the enforceability of the confidentiality of ongoing discussions.
perturbation.contradicted_law: The Defend Trade Secrets Act (DTSA) of 2016
perturbation.law_explanation: The DTSA protects trade secrets. By burying the clause about maintaining confidentiality of the business discussions, it makes it harder to demonstrate reasonable measures to protect the trade secret (the existence of the discussions), potentially weakening a claim under the DTSA should the information be leaked. The new placement makes it less explicit as a condition of confidentiality.

perturbation.justification: The Defend Trade Secrets Act (DTSA) aims to protect trade secrets, and reasonable measures to protect the trade secret are important. By moving the confidentiality clause, the modification weakens the enforceability of protecting the trade secret, creating a structural flaw that affects clarity and enforceability as per the definition, thus creating a legal contradiction. Snippet 1 mentions the Defend Trade Secrets Act of 2016 (DTSA), which makes it relevant to the law explanation.
